id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

devtype.description: Device type name, such as FortiGate, FortiClient, FortiMail, FortiWeb, FortiSandbox, FortiDDos, FortiDeceptor, FortiADC, FortiFirewall

url.description: The resource path to LogView Logfile State task.

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to Log Fields fetch method.

data.description: The data stream for the log fields.

defaultshow.description: If the fields is displayed by default.

extended.description: If it is an extended field. An extended field is neither in the logfile nor in the database.

private-field.description: The private fields to be listed. Private fields are those in the database but not in the logfiles.

defaultshow.description: If the fields is displayed by default.

extended.description: If it is an extended field. An extended field is neither in the logfile nor in the database.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

data-type.description: The type of return data, e.g. 'text/gzip/base64'.

devid.description: ID of the device hosting the logfile.

length.description: Length in byte of the file content to return. Default is 1MB, the maximum is 50MB.

offset.description: Offset bytes from the beginning of the file.

url.description: The resource path to Log-File Content task

vdom.description: Name of the VDOM. If left empty, all VDOM under the <devid> will be considered.

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to LogView Search fetch method.

data-type.description: The return type of data, e.g. 'text/gzip/base64'.

length.description: Actual length in byte of file content returned.

log-count.description: Actual number of logs returned when download csv or text logs.

logfile-orig-size.description: Uncompressed file size for gzip-format log files.

offset.description: Actual offset bytes from the beginning of the log file.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

devid.description: ID of the device hosting the logfile.

limit.description: Maximum number of log records to fetch.

offset.description: Offset number of log records from the beginning of the log file.

url.description: The resource path to Log-File Search task

vdom.description: Name of the VDOM hosting the logfile.

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to LogView Search fetch method.

data.description: An array of json objects hosting the returned logfile records.

fields.description: The value for the fields in original logfile.

return-lines.description: Number of total log records found in the logfile with regards to the conditions.

total-count.description: Number of total log records found in the logfile.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

devid.description: ID of the device. If left empty, all devices under the <adom-name> will be considered. See Appendix for available options

filename.description: name of the file. If left empty, all files under the <vdom> will be considered

end.description: Ending date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

start.description: Starting date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

timezone.description: The timezone index or name. Time range in request and date/time if any in response will follow this timezone. See Appendix

url.description: The resource path to Log-File State get task

vdom.description: Name of the VDOM. If left empty, all VDOM under the <devid> will be considered.

session.description: The cookie of an active session on FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to Log-File Search fetch method.

device-file-list.description: An array of json objects holding the results from devices.

endtime.description: The ending time of all found results of this device.

starttime.description: The starting time of all found results of this device.

vdom-file-list.description: An array of json objects holding the results from VDOMs

endtime.description: The ending time of all found results in this vdom.

logfile-list.description: An json object holding the list of logfiles

files.description: An array holds the basic information of the files

endtime.description: The ending time of the logfile content.

starttime.description: The starting time of the logfile content.

id.description: The numeric id of the logtype. See Appendix

name.description: The name of the logtype. See Appendix

starttime.description: The starting time of all found results in this vdom.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

device.description: Device filter. For all devices in some type please use the All-Device ID. See Appendix

csfname.description: Name of security fabric. Format: csfname. e.g. 'Corp_SF'

time-order.description: Sort result in descending or ascending order by time

end.description: Ending date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

start.description: Starting date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

timezone.description: The timezone index or name. Time range in request and date/time if any in response will follow this timezone. See Appendix

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A String specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value that responds to LogView Search method.

tid.description: The task ID for Log Search fetch task.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structured that holds the parameter values.

url.description: The resource path to log count tastk. tid is the task id of a log search request.

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to log count fetch method.

elapsed-time-ms.description: Time spent for the current task, in millisecond.

matched-logs.description: Number of all matched logs when "progress-percentage" is 100. If the percentage is below 100, repeated requests need to be sent to fetch the total count.

progress-percent.description: The searching process percentage for the corresponding task ID.

scanned-logs.description: Number of scanned logs, including matched and not matched logs.

total-logs.description: Number of all logs in the time range.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

result.description: A structured value that respond to Log Search cancel method.

task-id.description: The ID of the cancelled task.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structured that holds the parameter values.

url.description: The resource path to Log Search task

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to Log Search fetch method.

percentage.description: The searching process percentage for the corresponding task ID. Equals to 100 if found (1) requested number of matching logs (2) all matching logs.

return-lines.description: Number of returned lines. The task reaches the end of all results when percentage = 100 and 'return-lines' is smaller than 'limit' in the fetch request.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

device.description: Device filter. For all devices in some type please use the All-Device ID. See Appendix

csfname.description: Name of security fabric. Format: csfname. e.g. 'Corp_SF'

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to LogView Search fetch method.

data.description: The json object hosting the returned log stats records.

devs.description: An array of json objects hosting the returned log stats records.

encrypted-logging.description: Whether logging through encrypted transmission (1) or not (0).

encrypted_forwarding.description: Whether logging through reliable (encrypted) forwarding (1) or not (0).

is-ha.description: Whether the device is a HA member (1) or not (0).

logging-mode.description: The logging mode is 'store and upload' (1) or 'realtime' (0).

vdoms.description: An array of json objects hosting the vdoms' log stats records.

log-db-size.description: The size of logs in DB.

log-disk-size.description: The size of logs on disk.

log-interval-dev-no-logging-realtime.description: The interval of no real-time device log.

log-interval-dev-no-logging-upload.description: The interval of no upload device log.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to the pcapfile request.

data.description: A returned pcapfile compressed and encoded according to 'data-type'.

data-type.description: Indicating if the pcapfile is zipped with or without password and encoded in base64. e.g. 'base64', 'zip/base64' and 'zip-password/base64'.

file-category.description: The category of the returned pcapfile.

file-name.description: The filename of the returned pcapfile.

length.description: The length of encoded base64 data (excluding the ending '\0'.)

zip-password.description: Password for unzipping pcapfile if it is zipped with password.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

key-data.description: The key for searching pcapfile. It supports three type of data: 1) JSON format log , 2) txt format log and 3) pcapurl. A pcapurl can be found in the logsearch result if the log does have an associated pcapfile. e.g. 'pcapfile?ZGV2aWQ9IkZHMjAwRTRRMTc5MTYwNTkiIHZkPSJyb290IiBzdWJ0eXBlPSJhcHAtY3RybCIgY2hlY2tzdW09IiIgZXBvY2g9MCBpbmNpZGVudHNlcmlhbG5vPTM4NjE4Mzg5OSBzZXJ2aWNlPSJTU0wiIHR5cGU9InV0bSIgZXZlbnRpZD0wIGluZGVudGlkeD0wIGZpbGVwYXRoPSIvaXBzX2ZpbGVzL0ZHMjAwRTRRMTc5MTYwNTkvcm9vdC8xNjM0ODUxNTU0LzM4NjE4Mzg5OTowIg==\'. For more details, please click 'Show examples...' .

key-type.description: The type of the given key-data.

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

info.description:
Documentation for FortiAnalyzer JSON API

This daemon controls main system functions, including log in and log out. All APIs for this module are under the prefix /sys/.
info.title: FortiAnalyzer JSON API Documentation

post.description: Get the content of the specified log file.
Run a log search task on a single log file.
Get file state of log file(s).
Start a new task to search logs.
Cancel a log search task by the task ID.
Get the log search request result with the task ID.
Get the total number of logs with the task ID.
the last log time and log rate per device[vdom].
Get the pcapfile associated with a log.

tags.description: Handle log search requests by task ID.
tags.name: /logview/logsearch/<tid>
